title: Generating functions for multiple zeta star values
author_string: Khodabakhsh Hessami Pilehrood, Tatiana Hessami Pilehrood
abstract: We study generating functions for multiple zeta star values in general form. These generating functions provide a connection between multiple zeta star values and multiple Euler sums, which allows us to express each multiple zeta star value in terms of multiple alternating Euler sums, and specifically, reduce the length of blocks of twos in the resulting sums.
comment: To appear in Journal de Théorie des Nombres de Bordeaux
